customizations.summary: Changed Python imports from hookify.core.* to core.* for package name independence
customizations.reason: Plugin directory is forge-hookify not hookify, so absolute package imports like 'from hookify.core' would fail. Changed to relative 'from core.*' since PLUGIN_ROOT is already in sys.path.
